title: Sins of Casanova
writer: Emo Bistolfi, Gian Bistolfi, Sandro Continenza
actors: Gabriele Ferzetti, Corinne Calvet, Irene Galter
plot: 1760 Spain provides the setting for Giacomo Casanova's romantic escapades, every woman he encounters unable to resist his disarming charm, be they single, engaged, or even married.
